picks.quote: I think Iora is going to get the job done... I think Ilia Tapora is going to absolutely run right through Justin Gi.
I want Alex to win for a pickup on the odds here. I guess I'll lean with Alex Pereira.
I think Shauna Ali is going to show that there are levels to the fight game... I think Shauna Ali is going to knock out Emen Zahabi.
there's no way in hell I could pick Derrick Lewis after what I saw from him in his last fight. I'm obviously picking Josh Hokit here.
Ruffy's got to be the clear pick here... I think he's going to knock out Michael Chandler, though, in all honesty.
I'm going to go with Bone Nickel as the pick, but this is one I'm not touching.
slightly maybe slight lean towards Diego Lopez... Diego Lopez probably has more pass to victory.
